name: Belt Miner
description: Spent years cracking rock in the outer belts, running double shifts on aging drill rigs for outfits that barely kept the air filters clean.

name: Military Cosmonaut
description: Flew patrol routes for the People's Space Fleet.

name: Planning Clerk
description: Worked the books for a regional planning office.

name: Dock Worker
description: Loaded and unloaded cargo at orbital stations, welded hull plates between shifts, and learned how ships were put together by taking them apart.

name: Smuggler
description: Ran unlicensed freight through restricted lanes, staying one step ahead of state patrols.

name: Feldsher
description: Patched up miners and rig workers at remote extraction sites.

name: Laboratory Technician
description: Ran assays and sample analysis for a state research institute, cataloguing mineral compositions from core samples that field crews hauled back by the crate.

name: Apparatchik
description: Spent years in the state apparatus, pushing paper and building connections.
